Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed event
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Time elapsed from the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed to the start of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed appears at least once
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in high-complexity review paths (e.g., variants with multiple reviewer invitations or reminders)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision relative to the total time spent in SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurs

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that end with SW-EIC Accept versus those that end with SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Total waiting time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision following the final SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-reviewer assignments
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time between the first SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases with multiple reviewers agreeing
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that do not include any reviewer decline or unavailability events
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in pathways that contain SW-Reviewer Agreed, compared to those that do not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision grouped by case:concept:name to identify outlier manuscripts
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
